tasks.label: Compilar ERP 2.0
args: $sync = Resolve-Path '..\..\sincronizadorv2\sincronizador'; mvn -q -f (Join-Path $sync 'pom.xml') dependency:copy-dependencies -DincludeScope=runtime; $files = Get-ChildItem 'src','UTIL',(Join-Path $sync 'src\main\java') -Recurse -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object FullName; & javac --module-path 'C:/javafx-sdk-24.0.1/lib' --add-modules javafx.controls,javafx.fxml -cp "lib/*;$sync/target/dependency/*" -d 'bin' $files
